title: Water mushroom crops
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Water mushroom crops demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to use watering equipment

pcs.text: Identify mushroom watering requirements with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify mushroom watering requirements with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify mushroom watering requirements with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assemble and connect watering equipment components to water supply
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and connect watering equipment components to water supply?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and connect watering equipment components to water supply.

pcs.text: Add chemicals to water according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Add chemicals to water according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Add chemicals to water according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Read and record water meter for the area to be watered
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read and record water meter for the area to be watered?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read and record water meter for the area to be watered.

pcs.text: Identify rooms requiring watering and required watering pattern
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify rooms requiring watering and required watering pattern?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify rooms requiring watering and required watering pattern.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to use watering equipment

elements.title: Operate watering equipment

pcs.text: Follow site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements for watering operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements for watering operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow site quarantine protocols, workplace and personal hygiene requirements for watering operation.

pcs.text: Check and adjust water pressure to ensure correct spray or droplet pattern is achieved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and adjust water pressure to ensure correct spray or droplet pattern is achieved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust water pressure to ensure correct spray or droplet pattern is achieved.

pcs.text: Provide and distribute water evenly in the correct quantity and pressure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and distribute water evenly in the correct quantity and pressure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and distribute water evenly in the correct quantity and pressure.

pcs.text: Report and fix faults or variations in watering operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and fix faults or variations in watering operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and fix faults or variations in watering operations.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with work, and minimise impact.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate watering equipment

elements.title: Finalise watering operations

pcs.text: Read water meter for area, and record amount of water used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read water meter for area, and record amount of water used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read water meter for area, and record amount of water used.

pcs.text: Disconnect watering equipment and return to storage area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Disconnect watering equipment and return to storage area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Disconnect watering equipment and return to storage area.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable watering equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable watering equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable watering equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes and seek feedback on performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes and seek feedback on performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes and seek feedback on performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise watering operations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
